_metadata.description: Transformers: Victory (Japanese anime, 1989) — NEW characters only
_metadata.scope: Characters debuting in Transformers: Victory. Excludes characters from previous series (Ginrai/God Ginrai appears but becomes Victory Leo). Greatshot is a NEW character (not Sixshot retooled in-story, but a separate Six Clan member).
_metadata.continuity_note: Victory is set in 2025. Star Saber is Supreme Commander of Sector One; God Ginrai leads Sector Two. Episodic format (not arc-based like Masterforce). 32 original episodes + 6 clip shows = 38 broadcast episodes.

combiner_teams.Landcross (6 Multiforce): Wing, Waver, Dash, Tacker, Mach, Tackle
combiner_teams.Liokaiser (6 Breastforce): Leozack, Drillhorn, Killbison, Hellbat, Gaihawk, Jaruga
combiner_teams.Dinoking (6 Dinoforce): Goryu, Kakuryu, Rairyu, Doryu, Gairyu, Yokuryu

characters.name: Star Saber
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Autobot Supreme Commander. Brainmaster. Small jet (Saber) docks with larger booster jet (V-Star). Adoptive father of Jan Minakaze. Armed with the Saber Blade. Japanese name: Star Saber (スターセイバー)

characters.name: Victory Leo
characters.first_appearance: Victory E32 Ginrai Dies!!
characters.notes: God Ginrai's transtector reformatted after being fatally wounded by Deathsaurus. Savage but powerful. Combines with Star Saber to form Victory Saber. Japanese name: Victory Leo (ビクトリーレオ)

characters.name: Victory Saber
characters.first_appearance: Victory E33 Fight!! Victory Saber
characters.notes: Combined form of Star Saber and Victory Leo. Most powerful Autobot in the Victory series. Japanese name: Victory Saber (ビクトリーセイバー)

characters.name: Blacker
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Brainmaster leader. Star Saber's second-in-command. Forms Road Caesar's torso. Japanese name: Blacker (ブラッカー)

characters.name: Braver
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Brainmaster. Japanese name: Braver (ブレイバー)

characters.name: Laster
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Brainmaster. Japanese name: Laster (ラスター)

characters.name: Road Caesar
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Combined form of Blacker, Braver, and Laster. Three-member combiner (unusual). Japanese name: Road Caesar (ロードシーザー)

characters.name: Wing
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Multiforce leader. Can pair-combine with any Multiforce member. Usually forms Wingwaver with Waver. Japanese name: Wing (ウイング)

characters.name: Waver
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Multiforce member. Usually pair-combines with Wing to form Wingwaver. Japanese name: Waver (ウェーバー)

characters.name: Dash
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Multiforce member. Usually pair-combines with Tacker to form Dashtacker. Japanese name: Dash (ダッシュ)

characters.name: Tacker
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Multiforce member. Usually pair-combines with Dash to form Dashtacker. Japanese name: Tacker (タッカー)

characters.name: Mach
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Multiforce member. Usually pair-combines with Tackle to form Machtackle. Japanese name: Mach (マッハ)

characters.name: Tackle
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Multiforce member. Usually pair-combines with Mach to form Machtackle. Japanese name: Tackle (タックル)

characters.name: Landcross
characters.first_appearance: Victory E04 Unite!! Multiforce
characters.notes: Combined form of all six Multiforce members. Unique: any two members can pair-combine, and all six form Landcross. Japanese name: Landcross (ランドクロス)

characters.name: Greatshot
characters.alt_mode: Tank / jet / car / drill tank / winged wolf / gun
characters.first_appearance: Victory E24 Crisis! Ambush in the Desert
characters.notes: Six-changer samurai. Member of the Six Clan (like Sixshot and Sixknight). Retool of Sixshot toy. Japanese name: Greatshot (グレートショット)

characters.name: Galaxy Shuttle
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Large Autobot who transports the team. Carries the Brainmasters and Multiforce into battle. Japanese name: Galaxy Shuttle (ギャラクシーシャトル)

characters.name: Holi
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Rescue Patrol leader. Child-like personality. Close friend of Jan. Japanese name: Holi (ホーリー)

characters.name: Fire
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Rescue Patrol member. Japanese name: Fire (ファイアー)

characters.name: Boater
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Rescue Patrol member. Japanese name: Boater (ボーター)

characters.name: Pipo
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Rescue Patrol member. Japanese name: Pipo (ピーポ)

characters.name: Deathsaurus
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Decepticon Emperor of Destruction. Has two Breast Animals (tiger and eagle) that transform into weapons. Star Saber's nemesis. Commands the Thunder Arrow warship and the Planet-Destroying Fortress. Japanese name: Deszaras (デスザラス)

characters.name: Leozack
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Breastforce leader. Scheming and ambitious; plots to usurp Deathsaurus. Lion breast animal. Japanese name: Leozack (レオザック)

characters.name: Drillhorn
characters.first_appearance: Victory E04 Unite!! Multiforce
characters.notes: Breastforce member. Rhino breast animal. Japanese name: Drillhorn (ドリルホーン)

characters.name: Killbison
characters.first_appearance: Victory E04 Unite!! Multiforce
characters.notes: Breastforce member. Buffalo breast animal. Japanese name: Killbison (キルバイソン)

characters.name: Hellbat
characters.first_appearance: Victory E02 Dinoforce the Foolish Troops
characters.notes: Breastforce member. Sneaky and self-serving. Bat breast animal. Japanese name: Hellbat (ヘルバット)

characters.name: Gaihawk
characters.first_appearance: Victory E15 Rescue Gaihawk
characters.notes: Breastforce member. Last to join (imprisoned on Planet Micro). Hawk breast animal. Japanese name: Gaihawk (ガイホーク)

characters.name: Jaruga
characters.first_appearance: Victory E04 Unite!! Multiforce
characters.notes: Breastforce member. Also spelled Jaguar/Jallguar. Jaguar breast animal. Sometimes forms weapon for Liokaiser rather than a limb. Japanese name: Jaruga (ジャルガ)

characters.name: Liokaiser
characters.first_appearance: Victory E15 Rescue Gaihawk
characters.notes: Combined form of all six Breastforce members. Can turn invisible. Most powerful combiner in Victory. Japanese name: Liokaiser (ライオカイザー)

characters.name: Goryu
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Dinoforce commander. Pretender with T-Rex shell. Japanese name: Gōryū (剛龍)

characters.name: Kakuryu
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Dinoforce member. Pretender with Triceratops shell. Japanese name: Kakuryū (角龍)

characters.name: Rairyu
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Dinoforce member. Pretender with Brontosaurus shell. Japanese name: Rairyū (雷龍)

characters.name: Doryu
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Dinoforce member. Pretender with Stegosaurus shell. Japanese name: Doryū (土龍)

characters.name: Gairyu
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Dinoforce member. Pretender with Pteranodon shell. Japanese name: Gairyū (凱龍)

characters.name: Yokuryu
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Dinoforce member. Pretender with Plesiosaur shell. Becomes weapon for Dinoking. Japanese name: Yokuryū (翼龍)

characters.name: Dinoking
characters.first_appearance: Victory E04 Unite!! Multiforce
characters.notes: Combined form of all six Dinoforce members. Bumbling but dangerous. Japanese name: Dinoking (ダイノキング)

characters.name: Jan Minakaze
characters.first_appearance: Victory E01 The Brave Hero of the Universe - Star Saber
characters.notes: Star Saber's adopted human son. Orphaned when his parents were killed in a Decepticon attack. Japanese name: Jan Minakaze (ジャン南風)

characters.name: Illumina
characters.first_appearance: Victory E09 Fight!! Rescue Team
characters.notes: Human woman. Jan's classmate's teacher. Briefly befriended by Autobots. Japanese name: Illumina (イルミナ)

characters.name: Deathcobra
characters.first_appearance: Victory E34 The Terror of the Giant Fortress
characters.notes: Briefly considered by Leozack as Hellbat's replacement in Breastforce. Japanese name: Deathcobra (デスコブラ)
